content: spatie/laravel-permission is the dominant Laravel RBAC package (100M+ installs) but is purpose-built for dynamic, database-editable roles/permissions with many-to-many pivot tables and permission caching. For a fixed two-role system, a role enum column plus native Gates/Policies is simpler, avoids extra migrations and cache invalidation, and is the community-recommended minimal approach when roles are hardcoded and few.
